# Vike Framework Documentation - LLM Header File

> **CRITICAL FOR AI AGENTS:**
> - READ THIS ENTIRE FILE - don't stop at the top
> - These are connection points, NOT actual documentation
> - MUST fetch actual pages when you identify matches
> - MUST open relevant pages based on user prompts

---

## meta (Custom Settings) - https://vike.dev/meta
Extending Vike's configuration system, building framework abstractions, modifying built-in behavior. Custom settings/hooks definition, environment specification (server/client/config), cumulative settings, effect functions. TypeScript Vike.Config, framework extension, config-time logic, setting creation, meta programming.

## Hooks Overview - https://vike.dev/hooks
Understanding hook execution order/lifecycle, choosing correct hook for task, architectural overview. Complete hook list, lifecycle flow, OODA loop, precedence categories. Server/client/both execution, rendering pipeline, first render vs client navigation, custom hooks.

## config (Configuration) - https://vike.dev/config
Understanding + files system, organizing configuration, inheritance patterns. +config.js central config, pointer imports, domain-driven structure. File organization, global vs page configs, extends option, hierarchy, config loading.

## onBeforeRender Hook - https://vike.dev/onBeforeRender
Advanced data orchestration, deep tool integration beyond simple data(). Lower-level hook, multiple pageContext values simultaneously, meta orchestration. GraphQL, Apollo, Relay, Tanstack Query, Telefunc, tRPC, expert mode.

## modifyUrl Utility - https://vike.dev/modifyUrl
Programmatic URL transformation, extracting locale from URLs. URL component manipulation, pathname/protocol/hostname/port modification. i18n, internationalization, locale extraction, URL rewriting, language routing.

## injectFilter - https://vike.dev/injectFilter
Controlling asset injection strategy, custom preload logic. Asset type filtering, HTML_BEGIN vs HTML_END injection points. Performance tuning, dependency graph, script/font/image preloading.

## passToClient - https://vike.dev/passToClient
Making server pageContext properties available client-side. Serialization control, nested property paths, cumulative setting. Hydration, data exposure, security, SSR synchronization, JSON serialization.

## escapeInject - https://vike.dev/escapeInject
Server-side HTML generation with XSS protection. String template tag, HTML sanitization, dangerouslySkipEscape. Cross-site scripting prevention, onRenderHtml, safe interpolation.

## csp (Content Security Policy) - https://vike.dev/csp
Security compliance, script authorization, nonce generation. Automatic nonce for script tags, PCI DSS compliance. cspNonce, inline scripts, security headers, crypto random strings.

## headersResponse - https://vike.dev/headersResponse
HTTP response header customization per page. Security header configuration, headersOriginal for requests. CORS, cache control, CSP integration, renderPage.

## stream (HTML Streaming) - https://vike.dev/stream
Progressive rendering, React Suspense streaming, performance optimization. SSR streaming, first paint optimization. HTTP streaming, onRenderHtml streaming, FOUC prevention.

## clientRouting - https://vike.dev/clientRouting
Enabling SPA-like navigation, smooth page transitions. Client-Side Routing, automatic link interception, isHydration check. navigate(), onRenderClient, prefetching, state initialization, progressive enhancement.

## guard Hook - https://vike.dev/guard
Page protection, authentication/authorization checks, access control. Executes first after routing before data(), always with throw render()/redirect(). Admin pages, permission checks, user roles, pre-data-fetch validation.

## throw render() - https://vike.dev/render
Error page rendering, URL rewriting without redirect, internal page switching. Programmatic rendering without URL change, status code handling. Abort, abortReason, abortStatusCode, 401/403/404/500 errors.

## throw redirect() - https://vike.dev/redirect
Authentication flow redirects, login/logout, form validation redirects. Abort and redirect user, 302 temporary or 301 permanent. Post-authentication navigation, authorization redirects, error redirects.

## photon (Deployment) - https://vike.dev/photon
Vercel deployment, ISR, cloud platform integration. Vike-Photon package, SSG and SSR support, beta feature. Hybrid deployment, vike-server replacement, incremental static regeneration.

## Settings Overview - https://vike.dev/settings
Configuration discovery, comparing settings, complete feature reference. Comprehensive built-in settings overview, categorized reference. Page, Layout, Wrapper, route, prerender, ssr, stream, redirects, title, description.

## Routing Precedence - https://vike.dev/routing-precedence
Route conflict resolution, debugging multiple matches. Precedence hierarchy, static prioritized over parameterized. Route priority, precedence number, conflict resolution, route ordering.

## Route Functions - https://vike.dev/route-function
Complex routing requirements, conditional logic, custom algorithms. Full programmatic flexibility, routeParams and precedence return. RegExp routing, routing libraries, async/sync variants, RouteSync, RouteAsync.

## onBeforePrerenderStart Hook - https://vike.dev/onBeforePrerenderStart
SSG configuration, parameterized route URLs, build-time bulk data. Build-time execution only, URL list for dynamic routes. Static generation, movie/@id patterns, build optimization, vite build.

## onPrerenderStart Hook - https://vike.dev/onPrerenderStart
Pre-rendering initialization, global SSG setup. Global hook at build start, server-side only. Build process initialization, SSG startup.

## data Hook - https://vike.dev/data
Fetching initial page data, database queries, server-side loading. Server-side by default, ORM/SQL access, data serialization. pageContext.data, useData, route parameters, pre-rendering data.

## onData Hook - https://vike.dev/onData
Reacting to data availability, store population, side effects. Called when pageContext.data available, cumulative, both sides. State management initialization, reactive data, global store.

## onError Hook - https://vike.dev/onError
Error handling setup, error tracking integration. Rendering error handling, automatic error page. 404/500 pages, Sentry, Bugsnag, error logging, exception handling.

## onHydrationEnd Hook - https://vike.dev/onHydrationEnd
Post-hydration initialization, one-time browser setup. After hydration completes, client-side only, first load only. Service worker registration, analytics initialization, interactive state.

## onPageTransitionStart Hook - https://vike.dev/onPageTransitionStart
Page transition animations, loading indicators during navigation. Navigation start before render, isBackwardNavigation access. Loading states, transition effects, SPA navigation.

## onCreatePageContext Hook - https://vike.dev/onCreatePageContext
Custom pageContext initialization, adding properties per page. Called at pageContext creation, both sides, right after routing. Derived values, instance creation, per-page setup.

## onCreateGlobalContext Hook - https://vike.dev/onCreateGlobalContext
Global context initialization, app-wide state. Server start / client website open, lives until close. Global state, shared context, application lifecycle.

## hooksTimeout - https://vike.dev/hooksTimeout
Hook timeout errors, slow operations, performance debugging. 30-second default, separate warning/error timeouts, per-hook config. Memory leak prevention, execution limits, long-running requests.

## keepScrollPosition - https://vike.dev/keepScrollPosition
Nested layout navigation (tabs/sidebars), scroll preservation. Scroll groups for arbitrary collections, programmatic control. Multi-page forms, product navigation, tab navigation, UX optimization.

## prefetchStaticAssets - https://vike.dev/prefetchStaticAssets
Link prefetching, viewport/hover strategies, mobile optimization. 'viewport' or 'hover' modes, Client Routing only. data-prefetch-static-assets, progressive loading, page speed.

## redirects Setting - https://vike.dev/redirects
Permanent URL redirections, link aliases, pattern-based rewrites. HTTP 301, @ parameters and * wildcards, server-side only. URL migration, deprecated URLs, mailto/magnet links, external links.

## prerender Setting - https://vike.dev/prerender
SSG settings, partial pre-rendering, build process customization. Parallelization, noExtraDir, disableAutoRun, keepDistServer. CPU parallelization, memory management, static HTML generation.

## pageContext - https://vike.dev/pageContext
Accessing page information, URL parameters, troubleshooting state. Central object with built-in properties, TypeScript extension support. urlParsed, routeParams, Page, data, headers, config, isClientSide, isHydration.

## globalContext - https://vike.dev/globalContext
Application-wide state, server vs client lifecycle differences. Server start vs user visit lifecycle, edge deployment considerations. getGlobalContext, getGlobalContextAsync, worker processes.

## useConfig Hook - https://vike.dev/useConfig
Dynamic head tags from components, data-driven metadata. Universal hook, call before await in data(). SEO meta tags, og:image, Config/Head components, React Query integration.

## useData Hook - https://vike.dev/useData
Accessing fetched data in components, type-safe access. Component hook for data() return, UI framework integration. vike-react, vike-vue, vike-solid, type inference.

## usePageContext Hook - https://vike.dev/usePageContext
Accessing pageContext in components, route params in UI. React Context / Vue provide/inject implementation. Context provider, component context, URL information.

## getGlobalContext Utility - https://vike.dev/getGlobalContext
Global context outside hooks, assets manifest needs. Server/client utility, Vite config subset, anytime access. Assets manifest, runtime access, getGlobalContextAsync.

## navigate Function - https://vike.dev/navigate
Programmatic navigation, form submission redirects. Client-side navigation, scroll/history options. keepScrollPosition, overwriteLastHistoryEntry, window.history.

## reload Function - https://vike.dev/reload
Programmatic page reload, authentication cookie updates. Client router reload, faster than window.location.reload. Post-logout/login refresh, cookie update.

## prefetch Function - https://vike.dev/prefetch
Predictive page loading, form workflow optimization. Programmatic prefetching, static asset preloading. Performance optimization, navigation speed.

## clientOnly Function - https://vike.dev/clientOnly
SSR-incompatible components, browser-only APIs, heavy interactive components. Client-side only loading, dynamic imports, code-splitting. Window object, lazy loading, fallback content, maps/charts.

## renderPage Function - https://vike.dev/renderPage
Custom server integration, Express/Hono/Fastify setup. Server-side rendering function, embedding into any framework. Production server, middleware, HTTP response, Node.js/Workers.

## Page Component - https://vike.dev/Page
Defining pages, setting up root component. Core setting, exported from +Page.js, available at pageContext.Page. onRenderHtml, onRenderClient, JSX/Vue/Solid component.

## Layout Component - https://vike.dev/Layout
Consistent layouts, nested layouts, navigation structure. Wraps Page, cumulative nesting, visual structure. Header/footer, layout hierarchy, same-page navigation, tabs.

## Wrapper Component - https://vike.dev/Wrapper
Third-party tool integration, state management setup. Wraps Layout and Page, multiple nest, tool integration. Redux, Apollo, TanStack Query, context providers.

## Head Setting - https://vike.dev/Head
Global metadata, favicon/PWA, crawler-intended tags. Cumulative configuration, script/meta/link tags. Open Graph, og:type, robots meta, apple-touch-icon, manifest.

## title Setting - https://vike.dev/title
Page title configuration, dynamic titles. Page title tag, per-page override, data-based generation. document.title, SEO, pageContext.data.

## description Setting - https://vike.dev/description
Meta description, SEO optimization. Meta description tag, dynamic from data. og:description, social sharing.

## image Setting - https://vike.dev/image
Social media preview, URL sharing image. og:image configuration, preview images. Twitter card, Facebook preview, social cards.

## viewport Setting - https://vike.dev/viewport
Mobile responsiveness, viewport configuration. Meta viewport tag, initial-scale, device-width. Responsive design, zoom control, user-scalable.

## htmlAttributes Setting - https://vike.dev/htmlAttributes
HTML tag attributes, dark mode class. Attributes on <html> tag, dynamic attributes. Lang attribute, theme class, root element.

## bodyAttributes Setting - https://vike.dev/bodyAttributes
Body tag attributes, body classes. Attributes on <body> tag, theme application. Body class, document body customization.

## ssr Setting - https://vike.dev/ssr
Disabling SSR for pages, SPA mode configuration. Enable/disable server-side rendering, ssr: false for SPA. Client-side only rendering, render mode control.

## Routing (Overview) - https://vike.dev/routing
Understanding routing basics, URL structure, route parameters. Filesystem/String/Function routing, @ parameter, glob patterns. URL mapping, guard() hook, route organization.

## Filesystem Routing - https://vike.dev/filesystem-routing
Automatic routing, file-based URL mapping. URL from file location, (parentheses) ignored, case sensitive. Pages directory, src directory, domain-driven structure.

## Route String - https://vike.dev/route-string
Parameterized routes, glob patterns. @ parameter syntax, * catch-all, routeParams. /product/@id, URL patterns, dynamic routes.

## route Setting - https://vike.dev/route
Defining page URLs, routing logic. Three types (Filesystem/String/Function), pageContext.routeParams. +route.js, URL matching, TypeScript support.

## Preloading - https://vike.dev/preloading
Asset preloading, early hints, 103 Early Hint. Automatic preload tags, injectFilter customization. pageContext.httpResponse.earlyHints, assets manifest.

## CLI - https://vike.dev/cli
Running dev/build/preview, CLI options, npm scripts. vike dev/build/preview/prerender, VIKE_CONFIG, VITE_CONFIG. --host, --port, --mode, JSON5 syntax.

## JavaScript API - https://vike.dev/api
Programmatic control, custom framework building. dev()/build()/preview()/prerender() functions. viteConfig, viteServer, vikeConfig, Build Your Own Framework.

## Error Page - https://vike.dev/error-page
Custom 404/500, error handling implementation. /pages/_error/+Page.js, is404/abortReason/abortStatusCode. 404.html, throw render integration.

## client Entry - https://vike.dev/client
Client-side initialization, global browser code. +client.js, runs before other client code. Sentry setup, window events, error tracker.

## Why Vike - https://vike.dev/why
Framework benefits, philosophy, comparison. Flexible by design, low-level hooks, future-proof. Progressive migration, unopinionated, ecosystem.

## Data Fetching (Overview) - https://vike.dev/data-fetching
Overview of data loading approaches. +data hook, ORM/SQL access, serialization. vike-react-query, Telefunc, RPC, API routes, GraphQL.

## Pre-rendering (SSG) - https://vike.dev/pre-rendering
Static site generation, build-time rendering, when to pre-render. HTML at build-time, prerender: true, SSG vs SSR. GitHub Pages, Cloudflare Pages, Netlify, onBeforePrerenderStart.

## SSR vs SPA - https://vike.dev/SSR-vs-SPA
Choosing between SSR and SPA, SEO requirements. Server HTML vs empty shell, +ssr toggle. SEO, AI visibility, hydration, content vs interaction apps.

## Head Tags - https://vike.dev/head-tags
Setting head tags, dynamic metadata. Global via +config.ts, per-page override, +Head cumulative. useConfig() hook, +Head component, dynamic head.

## Common Issues - https://vike.dev/common-issues
Troubleshooting broken packages, hydration mismatch. ssr.noExternal, hydration errors. npm package errors, debugging, configuration fixes.

## Base URL - https://vike.dev/base-url
Subdirectory deployment, CDN configuration. vite.config.js base, import.meta.env.BASE_URL. baseAssets, baseServer, CDN deployment.

## Active Links - https://vike.dev/active-links
Navigation highlighting, current page indicator. usePageContext() with urlPathname, CSS class. Navigation styling, Link component.

## Static Directory - https://vike.dev/static-directory
Serving static files, public directory. public/ directory, dist/client/, content hash. robots.txt, express.static(), asset serving.

## File Environment - https://vike.dev/file-env
Protecting secrets, server-only code. .server.js ensures no client leak, .client.js, .shared.js. + files environment, security, prevent leaks.

## Environment Variables - https://vike.dev/env
.env files, secrets management. PUBLIC_ENV__ prefix, import.meta.env, static replacement. .env.production, .env.development, OS variables.

## HTTP Headers - https://vike.dev/headers
Request headers, cookies, response headers. pageContext.headers normalized, headersOriginal. Cookie parsing, headersResponse, renderPage.

## Internationalization (i18n) - https://vike.dev/i18n
Multi-language support, locale routing. onBeforeRoute() for locale, modifyUrl, Link component update. ?lang=fr, domain.fr, Accept-Language, pre-rendering i18n.

## Path Aliases - https://vike.dev/path-aliases
Import aliases, replacing relative imports. #root convention, resolve.alias, Node.js imports. tsconfig.json paths, vite.config, import shortcuts.

## API Routes - https://vike.dev/api-routes
Creating API endpoints, REST API implementation. No built-in API routes, use Telefunc or server middleware. Express.js API, Hono API, vike-photon, catch-all middleware.

## GitHub Pages Deployment - https://vike.dev/github-pages
GitHub static hosting, GitHub Actions. dist/client/ deployment, .nojekyll file. Subdirectory deployment, automated deployment.

## Netlify Deployment - https://vike.dev/netlify
Netlify static hosting, Netlify Functions. vike build, dist/client/. Build command, SSR via Functions.

## Cloudflare Pages Deployment - https://vike.dev/cloudflare-pages
Cloudflare Pages (being deprecated). DEPRECATED - use Cloudflare Workers instead. vike-photon, migration to Workers.

## Cloudflare Deployment - https://vike.dev/cloudflare
Cloudflare Workers, edge deployment. Photon integration, workerd runtime, 3MB bundle limit. D1, KV, bindings, Wrangler, edge computing.

## Vercel Deployment - https://vike.dev/vercel
Vercel serverless, ISR. Photon integration, Incremental Static Regeneration. Vercel CLI, Git integration, Build Output API.

## AWS Deployment - https://vike.dev/aws
AWS Lambda, serverless AWS. Vike as middleware, Serverless Framework. SST, Hono AWS integration.

## Docker Deployment - https://vike.dev/docker
Containerization, HMR in Docker. server.host: true, HMR websocket, --max-old-space-size. WSL, out-of-memory errors, Node.js containers.

## Authentication - https://vike.dev/auth
Auth implementation, login/logout, user sessions. pageContext.user, +onCreatePageContext.server.js, pageContext.runtime.req. Better Auth, Auth.js, Passport.js, Auth0, Grant.

## Server Integration - https://vike.dev/server-integration
Express/Hono/Fastify integration, custom server. vike-server extension, renderPage() manual integration. VPS deployment, middleware, production server.

## Error Tracking - https://vike.dev/error-tracking
Sentry/Bugsnag integration, production error monitoring. +client.js initialization, +onError() hook. import.meta.env.PROD, exception tracking.

## CSS-in-JS - https://vike.dev/css-in-js
styled-components, avoiding FOUC. Style collection, onBeforeRenderHtml/onAfterRenderHtml. styled-jsx, Compiled, Grommet, collectedStyles.

## Markdown - https://vike.dev/markdown
MDX integration, frontmatter, Markdown pages. @mdx-js/rollup, unplugin-vue-markdown, custom settings eager. @cyco130/vite-plugin-mdx, vite-plugin-md, metadata.js.

## Store (State Management) - https://vike.dev/store
Redux/Pinia/Vuex integration, global state. vike-vue-pinia, storeInitialState, passToClient. Immutable state, hydration mismatch, SSR state.

## Integration (Advanced) - https://vike.dev/integration
Vanilla UI tools, analytics, View Transitions. onHydrationEnd() for initialization, +client.js. jQuery, Google Analytics, Bootstrap, service workers, navigate().

---

**End of Header - Always fetch actual documentation pages for current information**
